title: Buttery Silky Argentinian Chicken Sandwich
description: A buttery, silky chicken breast sandwich with Argentine inspired seasoning, served on toasted paleo bread with a drizzle of chimichurri and a creamy avocado spread.

ingredients.name: Argentine seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: mix dried oregano, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, pepper

instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat and add olive oil and butter.
Season the chicken breasts with the Argentine seasoning blend.
Cook the chicken 4‑5 min per side or until golden and an instant-read thermometer reads 165 °F (74 °C); transfer to a plate and let rest 5 min.
While the chicken rests, toast the paleo bread slices until golden and set aside.
In a small pan, melt the remaining butter and add minced garlic, cooking for about 1 min until fragrant; remove from heat.
Slice the rested chicken into thin strips and arrange on the toasted bread.
Drizzle the garlic‑butter over the chicken, then layer avocado slices and spoon chimichurri sauce on top.
Fold the sandwich, slice in half if desired, and serve immediately.
